# EG Bookkeeping LLC

> EG Bookkeeping LLC is a professional bookkeeping service provider specializing in cloud-based financial management for law firms, real estate professionals, and small businesses. With over 15 years of experience and certified expertise in QuickBooks Online and Xero, we deliver accurate, timely, and tailored bookkeeping solutions that empower businesses to focus on growth while we handle the numbers.

## About the Business

EG Bookkeeping LLC was founded by Md. Reazul Haque (Reaz), a seasoned bookkeeping professional with certifications in QuickBooks Online Advanced and Xero Advisor. Our mission is to deliver accurate, timely, and tailored bookkeeping solutions that simplify financial management for businesses. We are dedicated to upholding the highest standards of integrity, ensuring compliance, and building trust with every client we serve.

**Location:** 1209 MOUNTAIN ROAD PL NE, STE R, ALBUQUERQUE, NM 87110, USA

**Contact:**
- Email: reaaz@egbookkeeping.com, support@egbookkeeping.com
- Phone: +1 505 523 2471
- WhatsApp: +88 01973 301465

**Certifications:**
- QuickBooks Online Advanced Certified
- Xero Advisor Certified Partner
- Certificate of Completion - Accounting Cycle for Rentals

**Our Vision:** We aspire to be the premier bookkeeping partner across diverse industries, recognized for our exceptional expertise, unwavering reliability, and a commitment to our clients' success. Our goal is to empower businesses of all sizes with financial clarity and confidence, driving sustainable growth, long-term success, and enduring client relationships.

**Our Mission:** Our mission is to deliver accurate, timely, and tailored bookkeeping solutions that simplify financial management for businesses. We are dedicated to upholding the highest standards of integrity, ensuring compliance, and building trust with every client we serve. By taking the burden of bookkeeping off your shoulders, we empower you to focus on growing your business and achieving your goals.

## Core Services

We specialize in comprehensive bookkeeping services designed for specific industries:

- **Catch-Up & Clean-Up Bookkeeping:** Bring your books up to date fast. Get a full year's bookkeeping done in just 2-3 weeks for stress-free tax filing and peace of mind. Includes up to 12 months of bookkeeping, full account reconciliation, clean and accurate financials ready for tax time, error fixing, and QuickBooks & Xero expertise.

- **Monthly Bookkeeping:** Stay stress-free with reliable monthly bookkeeping. We track transactions weekly and deliver simple, clear reports each month. Includes weekly transaction tracking, monthly account reconciliations, clear financial reports (P&L, balance sheet, cash flow), and insights to grow and manage cash flow confidently.

- **Monthly Real Estate Bookkeeping:** Designed for real estate professionals. Tracks every transaction so you can focus on growing your portfolio. Includes accurate tracking of rental income & property expenses, categorization by property or unit, monthly financial reports, reconciliation of bank, mortgage, and escrow accounts, and support with tax prep and Schedule E reporting.

- **Monthly Legal Bookkeeping:** Specialized legal bookkeeping service ensures your firm's financials are accurate, organized, and fully compliant. Includes accurate tracking of revenue, retainers & expenses, monthly 3-way trust account reconciliations (IOLTA), matter-by-matter bookkeeping, monthly financial reports, and support for audit readiness & tax filing.

- **Payroll Services:** Accurate, compliant, and hassle-free. Includes timely payroll processing (weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly), federal & state payroll tax filings, new hire reporting and employee onboarding, W-2s and 1099s at year-end, and accurate payroll records for audits and financial reporting.

- **U.S. Tax Services:** Fast, accurate, stress-free, and IRS compliant. Includes federal tax return prep (1040, 1040-SR, 1040-NR), business tax filings (C Corp, S Corp, and Partnership returns), Schedule C filing for freelancers & gig workers, state income tax preparation for all states, and IRS notices, audits & penalty relief support.

## Industries We Serve

**Law Firms:** We specialize in legal bookkeeping and understand the unique requirements of law firms, including IOLTA (Interest on Lawyers Trust Accounts) compliance, trust accounting, three-way reconciliation, and legal-specific financial reporting. Our services are ideal for law firm owners, managing partners, solo attorneys, boutique firms, and legal practices using IOLTA/trust accounts.

**Real Estate:** Streamline your real estate finances with tailored bookkeeping. From tracking property expenses to managing client payments, we handle the details so you can focus on closing deals. Our services are ideal for rental property owners, real estate investors & flippers, property managers & landlords, and short-term & vacation rental hosts (Airbnb, VRBO).

**Other Industries:** We also serve small businesses & startups, nonprofits & NGOs, and the hospitality sector.

## Accounting Platforms We Use

We utilize industry-leading accounting and legal practice management platforms to ensure accuracy, efficiency, and peace of mind for your business:

- QuickBooks Online (Advanced Certified ProAdvisor)
- Xero (Certified Advisor)
- CosmoLex (Legal Practice Management)
- LawPay (Legal Payments)
- Clio (Legal Practice Management)
- LEAP (Legal Practice Management)
- Buildium (Property Management)

## Benefits of Our Services

- **Time & Cost Savings:** Save 240+ hours and cut at least $40k a year in hiring costs. We work five days a week (but not limited to), giving you the freedom to focus on your business.

- **Informed Decisions:** Make informed decisions with dependable financial data, concise reports, and expert advice.

- **Optimized Finances:** Prevent overpayments, remain confident during audits, and maximize your tax deductions efficiently.

- **Accuracy Focus:** We ensure every number is accurate, reducing fraud risks and errors, safeguarding your financial health.

- **Financial Insights:** Our bookkeeper organizes and reconciles your financial data, providing clear and insightful reports on your business's health.

- **Boost Efficiency:** Experience improved efficiency and productivity through enhanced processes, workflows, and systems in your business.

## How It Works

Our 9-step process ensures a smooth and efficient onboarding experience:

1. **Schedule a Meeting** - Discuss your pain points and business needs via Zoom, Google Meet, Slack, or WhatsApp
2. **Grant Access** - Provide access to your QuickBooks Online/Xero accountant access for assessment
3. **Discuss Pricing** - Agree on pricing based on the scope of work with flexible, tailored pricing
4. **Receive Invoice** - An invoice is issued as per the agreed price, sent to your email
5. **Sign the Agreement** - Formalize the terms by signing the agreement via secure e-signature platforms
6. **Make Full Payment** - Settle the invoice in full via Stripe or Debit/Credit Card
7. **Submit Documents** - Provide necessary documents including bank and credit card statements
8. **Work Begins** - We start working on your financials with bookkeeping tasks commencing immediately
9. **Timely Delivery** - Receive your completed work on time, delivered as promised

## Pricing

Our pricing is flexible and negotiable. We offer customized packages based on the scope of work, transaction volume, and complexity of your bookkeeping requirements. Our priority is to support your business success.

**Catch-Up & Clean-Up Bookkeeping:** Starting from $100 up to $1,500 based on the number of transactions and complexity of your records
- Basic: Up to 100 transactions per month
- Standard: Up to 300 transactions per month
- Premium: Up to 400 transactions per month

**Monthly Bookkeeping:**
- Startup Business: $199/month (up to 100 transactions)
- Small Business: $399/month (up to 200 transactions)
- Small Business Plus: $499/month (up to 300 transactions)
- Small Business Advanced: $599/month (up to 400 transactions)

**Monthly Real Estate Bookkeeping:**
- Startup Business: $249/month (up to 100 transactions)
- Small Business: $449/month (up to 200 transactions)
- Small Business Plus: $649/month (up to 300 transactions)
- Small Business Advanced: $849/month (up to 400 transactions)

**Monthly Legal Bookkeeping:**
- Basic Plan (Solo Practitioners): $325/month (up to 1 trust account, monthly reconciliation)
- Standard Plan (Small Law Firms): $875/month (up to 3 trust accounts, 3-way reconciliation)
- Premium Plan (Mid-sized Law Firms): $1525/month (up to 5 trust accounts, weekly reconciliations)

**Payroll Services & U.S. Tax Services:** Custom pricing based on your specific needs

## Why Choose EG Bookkeeping LLC

- **Experienced Professionals:** Our team consists of certified bookkeepers and accountants with extensive knowledge in financial reporting, tax compliance, and payroll management.

- **Tailored Solutions:** We offer customized bookkeeping and accounting services to fit your specific needs—whether you're a startup, small business, or growing enterprise.

- **Affordable Pricing:** Our bookkeeping services are designed to be cost-effective with no hidden fees. We provide transparent pricing plans for all budgets.

- **Advanced Technology:** We use the latest cloud-based accounting software such as QuickBooks, Xero, and industry-specific platforms, ensuring secure and accessible data.

- **Comprehensive Services:** From day-to-day bookkeeping to financial strategy and tax planning, we provide a one-stop solution for all your needs.

- **Dedicated Support:** We pride ourselves on providing exceptional customer service. Our team is always available to answer your questions.

## Security & Data Protection

At EG Bookkeeping LLC, protecting your financial, tax, and payroll information is one of our highest priorities. We apply industry-standard security protocols to safeguard your data from unauthorized access, alteration, or loss:

- Encrypted communication (SSL/TLS)
- Secure, compliant cloud platforms (SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA)
- Restricted access controls and two-factor authentication (2FA)
- Regular backups, monitoring, and updates

We treat all sensitive information — including tax documents, payroll records, financial statements, and identity details — with strict confidentiality, in line with IRS requirements and applicable data protection laws.
